name: Deck of Illusions
overview: A magical deck of cards that creates realistic illusions of creatures when drawn.

properties.composition: This box contains a set of cards. A full deck has 34 cards: 32 depicting specific creatures and two with a mirrored surface
properties.treasure_state: A deck found as treasure is usually missing 1d20 − 1 cards
properties.function: The magic of the deck functions only if its cards are drawn at random

activation: You can take a Magic action to draw a card at random from the deck and throw it to the ground at a point within 30 feet of yourself

illusion_creation.effect: An illusion of a creature, determined by rolling on the Deck of Illusions table, forms over the thrown card and remains until dispelled
illusion_creation.realism: The illusory creature created by the card looks and behaves like a real creature of its kind, except that it can do no harm

control: While you are within 120 feet of the illusory creature and can see it, you can take a Magic action to move it anywhere within 30 feet of its card

detection.physical_interaction: Any physical interaction with the illusory creature reveals it to be false, because objects pass through it
detection.investigation: A creature that takes a Study action to visually inspect the illusory creature identifies it as an illusion with a successful DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check

termination.conditions: The illusion lasts until its card is moved or the illusion is dispelled (using a Dispel Magic spell or a similar effect)
termination.card_effect: When the illusion ends, the image on its card disappears, and that card can't be used again

note: Stat blocks for these creatures (except the card drawer) appear in the Monster Manual
